zh.lifeSummary: 當John Echols, Jr.於1650年出生時，他的父親John Echols, Sr., English Immigrant32歲，母親Sarah Hubbard, English Immigrant22歲。他於1678年與Sarah Cave在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州結婚。他於1649年住在英國爾維爾姆斯洛福。他去世於1712年12月12日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州金 安德 昆恩享年62歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州金 安德 昆恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Echols, Jr.于1650年出生时，他的父亲John Echols, Sr., English Immigrant32岁，母亲Sarah Hubbard, English Immigrant22岁。他于1678年与Sarah Cave在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州结婚。他于1649年住在英国爾維爾姆斯洛福。他去世于1712年12月12日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州金 安德 昆恩享年62岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州金 安德 昆恩。

nameMeanings.name: Echols,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of English   Eccles   and possibly also of German   Eckels  .

variants.name: Eccles
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Eccles in Lancashire, or possibly from any of several other places so named in Kent, Norfolk, Berwickshire, and Dumfriesshire, from British eglēs ‘Romano-British Christian church’ (from Latin ecclesia, Greek ekklēsia ‘gathering, assembly’). Such places would have been the sites of notable pre-Anglo-Saxon churches or Christian places of communal worship.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When John Echols, Jr. was born in 1650, his father, John Echols, Sr., English Immigrant, was 32 and his mother, Sarah Hubbard, English Immigrant, was 22. He married Sarah Cave in 1678, in Virginia, British Colonial America. He lived in Wilmslow, Cheshire, England in 1649. He died on 12 December 1712, in King and Queen, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 62, and was buried in King and Queen, Virginia, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Echols, Jr. est né en 1650, son père, John Echols, Sr., English Immigrant, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Sarah Hubbard, English Immigrant, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Cave en 1678, à Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Il a vécu à Wilmslow, Cheshire, Angleterre en 1649. Il est décédé le 12 décembre 1712, à King and Queen, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à King and Queen, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Echols, Jr. 1650 geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Echols, Sr., English Immigrant 32 und seine Mutter Sarah Hubbard, English Immigrant 22. Er hat 1678 in Virginia, British Colonial America Sarah Cave geheiratet. 1649 hat er in Wilmslow, Cheshire, England gelebt. Er starb am 12. Dezember 1712 im Alter von 62 Jahren in King and Queen, Virginia, British Colonial America und wurde in King and Queen, Virginia, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Echols, Jr. è nato il nel 1650, il suo padre, John Echols, Sr., English Immigrant, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Sarah Hubbard, English Immigrant, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Sarah Cave nel 1678, nel Virginia, British Colonial America. Vissuto a Wilmslow, Cheshire, England nel 1649. Morì il 12 dicembre 1712, nel King and Queen, Virginia, British Colonial America, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a King and Queen, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ja.King, Mercer County, West Virginia, Brit: アメリカ合衆国ウエストバージニア州メルサーキング
ja.lifeSummary: John Echols, Jr.が1650年に生まれた時，父John Echols, Sr., English Immigrantは32歳，母Sarah Hubbard, English Immigrantは22歳であった。1678年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州でSarah Caveと結婚した。彼は1649年にはイギリスチェシュアイアウィルムスロウに住んでいた。彼は1712年12月12日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州キング アンド クイーンで62歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州キング アンド クイーンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Echols, Jr.(이)가 1650년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Echols, Sr., English Immigrant(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Hubbard, English Immigrant(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1678년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주에서 Sarah Cave(와)과 결혼했다. 1649년도에 영국 체실르 윌슬로에서 살았다. 그는 1712년 12월 12일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 킨그 앤드 퀸에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 킨그 앤드 퀸에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Echols, Jr. nasceu em 1650, seu pai, John Echols, Sr., English Immigrant, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Hubbard, English Immigrant, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Cave em 1678, em Virginia, British Colonial America. Ele viveu em Wilmslow, Cheshire, Inglaterra em 1649. Ele faleceu em 12 de dezembro de 1712, em King and Queen, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em King and Queen, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Echols, Jr. родился в 1650 г., его отцу по имени John Echols, Sr., English Immigrant было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Sarah Hubbard, English Immigrant, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Cave в 1678 г. в местности Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. Он жил в местности уилмслоу, чешир, Англия в 1649 году. Он умер 12 декабря 1712 г. в местности кинг анд куин, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности кинг анд куин, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Echols, Jr. nació en 1650, su papá, John Echols, Sr., English Immigrant, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Sarah Hubbard, English Immigrant, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sarah Cave en 1678, en Virginia, British Colonial America. Vivió en Wilmslow, Cheshire, Inglaterra en 1649. Murió el 12 de diciembre de 1712, en King and Queen, Virginia, British Colonial America, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en King and Queen, Virginia, British Colonial America.
